name: YouTube Content Team (merged into Content Studio)
description: MERGED into content-studio (2026-07-05). Video production and multi-platform short-form content strategy. This alias redirects to the unified Content Studio team.

orchestration.delegation_strategy: This team has merged into **content-studio**. Do not do any work here. Immediately invoke `Skill(skill: "content-studio")` with the user's original request verbatim. The Content Studio orchestrator runs the VIDEO pipeline (creative brief → script/storyboard → review gates → assets → assembly → publish → distribution).
